action.code: async function(){ const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); const timeline=[]; const start=Date.now(); const maxMs=10000; const interval=500; function isVisible(el){ if(!el) return false; const st=getComputedStyle(el); if(!st) return false; if(st.display==='none'||st.visibility==='hidden'||Number(st.opacity||'1')<0.05) return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>1&&r.height>1; } function snap(){ const loginEl=document.querySelector('#SiderMenuLogin'); const personalEl=document.querySelector('#Personal'); const loginBtn=document.querySelector('.login-button-zpRsZb'); return { t:Date.now()-start, hasLogin:!!loginEl, loginVisible:isVisible(loginEl), hasPersonal:!!personalEl, personalVisible:isVisible(personalEl), loginText:loginBtn?String(loginBtn.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'' }; } while(Date.now()-start<=maxMs){ timeline.push(snap()); await sleep(interval); } const finalState=snap(); const states=timeline.map(s=>`${s.hasLogin&&s.loginVisible?'L':'-'}${s.hasPersonal&&s.personalVisible?'P':'-'}`); const transitions=[]; for(let i=1;i<states.length;i++){ if(states[i]!==states[i-1]) transitions.push({from:states[i-1],to:states[i],at:timeline[i].t}); } const html=String(document.documentElement?.outerHTML||document.body?.outerHTML||''); return { url:String(location.href||''), title:String(document.title||''), htmlLength:html.length, samples:timeline.length, firstState:timeline[0]||null, finalState, transitions, hasSiderMenuLogin:html.includes('id="SiderMenuLogin"'), hasPersonal:html.includes('id="Personal"') }; }
